zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bowyer於大約1500年出生時，他的父親William Bowyer of Petworth37歲，母親Elizabeth Tredcroft27歲。他於1512年與Margaret Anna Groves在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1552年6月22日之前，埋葬在英國素可其斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Bowyer于大约1500年出生时，他的父亲William Bowyer of Petworth37岁，母亲Elizabeth Tredcroft27岁。他于1512年与Margaret Anna Groves在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1552年6月22日之前，埋葬在英国素可其斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bowyer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker or seller of bows, or an archer, from Middle English bowyere, an agent derivative of Old English boga ‘bow’. Compare Bowman .

variants.name: Bowman
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for an archer, hunter or soldier armed with a bow, from Middle English bow(e)man, bouman (from Old English boga ‘bow’ + mann ‘man’). This word was distinguished from Bowyer , which denoted a maker or seller of bows.
Americanized form of German   Baumann   or the Dutch cognate   Bouwman  .

variants.name: Bouyer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Frederique, Monique, Napoleon.
French (southern): regional variant of   Bouvier  . Compare   Beyea  .

variants.name: Boyers
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of Bowyer , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bowyer was born about 1500, his father, William Bowyer of Petworth, was 37 and his mother, Elizabeth Tredcroft, was 27. He married Margaret Anna Groves in 1512, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 22 June 1552, and was buried in Chichester, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bowyer est né environ 1500, son père, William Bowyer of Petworth, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Tredcroft, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Anna Groves en 1512, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 22 juin 1552, et a été enterré à Chichester, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Bowyer um 1500 geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Bowyer of Petworth 37 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Tredcroft 27. Er hat 1512 in England, United Kingdom Margaret Anna Groves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 22. Juni 1552 und wurde in Chichester, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bowyer è nato il circa 1500, il suo padre, William Bowyer of Petworth, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Tredcroft, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Anna Groves nel 1512, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì prima del 22 giugno 1552, e fu sepolto a Chichester, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Bowyerが約1500年に生まれた時，父William Bowyer of Petworthは37歳，母Elizabeth Tredcroftは27歳であった。1512年にイギリスイギリスでMargaret Anna Grovesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1552年6月22日以前に死去し，イギリススセックスチチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bowyer(이)가 대략 1500년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bowyer of Petworth(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Tredcroft(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margaret Anna Groves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1552년 6월 22일 이전 사망했으며 영국 수세스 치체스터에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1500–before 22 June 1552: ойролцоогоор 1500 он–1552 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 22–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Bowyer nasceu aproximadamente 1500, seu pai, William Bowyer of Petworth, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Tredcroft, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Anna Groves em 1512, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu antes 22 de junho de 1552, e foi sepultado em Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bowyer родился около 1500 г., его отцу по имени William Bowyer of Petworth было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tredcroft, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Anna Groves в 1512 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер перед 22 июнь 1552 г. и был похоронен в местности шичестир, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Bowyer nació aproximadamente 1500, su papá, William Bowyer of Petworth, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Tredcroft, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret Anna Groves en 1512, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió antes de 22 de junio de 1552, y fue sepultado en Chichester, Sussex, Inglaterra.
